languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

languages.text: {n}Бездушная проекция подергивается и дрожит, однако голос Тразина Неисчислимого звучит ясно и четко — и холодная, пронизывающая до костей злоба, которой сочится речь ксеноса, заставляет вашу кровь застыть.{/n} "Вы... примитивные ничтожества! Я мог бы столетия объяснять вам, какую катастрофу вы сотворили, нарушив целостность и герметичность хранилища самой истории, но ваши ограниченные синаптические связи даже не способны обработать и усвоить эту информацию во всей ее чудовищности".

Я мог бы столетия объяснять вам, какую катастрофу вы сотворили, нарушив целостность и герметичность хранилища самой истории, но ваши ограниченные синаптические связи даже не способны обработать и усвоить эту информацию во всей ее чудовищности".
traits.speaker: EX_Trazyn

{n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

languages.text: {n}La imagen robótica se distorsiona y parpadea, pero la voz de Trazyn el Infinito se oye alto y claro; cada una de sus palabras supura un escalofriante odio que te hiela la sangre en las venas.{/n} «¡Malditas... alimañas... primitivas! Podría pasarme siglos explicando la calamidad que habéis causado al violar la integridad y las contenciones herméticas de este lugar, un repositorio de la historia misma, pero vuestras limitadas conexiones sinápticas ni siquiera serían capaces de procesar y absorber esta información en toda su monstruosidad».
languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

traits.locale_text: {n}La imagen robótica se distorsiona y parpadea, pero la voz de Trazyn el Infinito se oye alto y claro; cada una de sus palabras supura un escalofriante odio que te hiela la sangre en las venas.{/n} «¡Malditas... alimañas... primitivas! Podría pasarme siglos explicando la calamidad que habéis causado al violar la integridad y las contenciones herméticas de este lugar, un repositorio de la historia misma, pero vuestras limitadas conexiones sinápticas ni siquiera serían capaces de procesar y absorber esta información en toda su monstruosidad».

languages.text: {n}那没有灵魂的投影抽搐着，明灭不定，但无限者特拉金的声音依旧清晰可辨——他每一个字里所渗出的冷入骨髓的恶意，都足以让你血液凝固。{/n}“你们这群……原始……害虫！即便我花费数个世纪解释你们铸成的大祸，解释你们如何破坏了这个地方、这历史宝库本身的完整性与密封性，你们那可怜的神经连接也无法彻底理解这信息中的可怖之处。”
languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

traits.locale_text: {n}那没有灵魂的投影抽搐着，明灭不定，但无限者特拉金的声音依旧清晰可辨——他每一个字里所渗出的冷入骨髓的恶意，都足以让你血液凝固。{/n}“你们这群……原始……害虫！即便我花费数个世纪解释你们铸成的大祸，解释你们如何破坏了这个地方、这历史宝库本身的完整性与密封性，你们那可怜的神经连接也无法彻底理解这信息中的可怖之处。”

languages.text: {n}Malgré l'image vacillante de sa projection, la voix de Trazyn l'Infini se fait entendre avec une clarté parfaite. La froideur du profond mépris imprégnant chacun de ses mots vous glace le sang.{/n} « Espèces de... vermines... primitives ! Je pourrais m'évertuer des siècles durant à vous expliquer la catastrophe que vous avez provoquée en violant l'intégrité et le confinement hermétique de ce musée consacré à l'histoire elle-même, mais vos connexions synaptiques sont trop limitées pour traiter et absorber cette information dans toute sa monstruosité. »
languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Malgré l'image vacillante de sa projection, la voix de Trazyn l'Infini se fait entendre avec une clarté parfaite. La froideur du profond mépris imprégnant chacun de ses mots vous glace le sang.{/n} « Espèces de... vermines... primitives ! Je pourrais m'évertuer des siècles durant à vous expliquer la catastrophe que vous avez provoquée en violant l'intégrité et le confinement hermétique de ce musée consacré à l'histoire elle-même, mais vos connexions synaptiques sont trop limitées pour traiter et absorber cette information dans toute sa monstruosité. »

languages.text: {n}Ruhsuz projeksiyon seğiriyor ve titrese de Mutlak Trazyn'in sesi net ve belirgin bir şekilde duyuluyor. Her kelimesinden damlayan soğuk ve kemiklere işleyen kin, damarlarındaki kanı donduruyor.{/n} "İlkel... Dar görüşlü haşereler! Tarihin ta kendisinin deposu olan bu mekânın bütünlüğünü ve hermetik muhafazasını ihlal ederek yol açtığınız felaketi yüzyıllarca anlatabilirim ancak sınırlı sinaptik bağlantılarınız bu bilgiyi tüm o korkunçluğuyla işlemeye ve idrak etmeye yetkin değil."
languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ruhsuz projeksiyon seğiriyor ve titrese de Mutlak Trazyn'in sesi net ve belirgin bir şekilde duyuluyor. Her kelimesinden damlayan soğuk ve kemiklere işleyen kin, damarlarındaki kanı donduruyor.{/n} "İlkel... Dar görüşlü haşereler! Tarihin ta kendisinin deposu olan bu mekânın bütünlüğünü ve hermetik muhafazasını ihlal ederek yol açtığınız felaketi yüzyıllarca anlatabilirim ancak sınırlı sinaptik bağlantılarınız bu bilgiyi tüm o korkunçluğuyla işlemeye ve idrak etmeye yetkin değil."

languages.text: {n}Die seelenlose Projektion flackert, aber die Stimme von Trazyn dem Unendlichen ertönt klar und deutlich ... und die kalte Verachtung in jedem seiner Worte lässt dir das Blut in den Adern gefrieren.{/n} "Ihr ... primitiven ... Schaben! Ich könnte Jahrhunderte damit verbringen, dir die Katastrophe zu erklären, die ihr ausgelöst habt, als ihr die Integrität und hermetische Isolation dieses Ortes verletzt habt, des Repositoriums der Geschichte selbst. Allerdings sind deine beschränkten synaptischen Verbindungen nicht in der Lage, diese Informationen in all ihrer Monstrosität zu erfassen."
languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die seelenlose Projektion flackert, aber die Stimme von Trazyn dem Unendlichen ertönt klar und deutlich ... und die kalte Verachtung in jedem seiner Worte lässt dir das Blut in den Adern gefrieren.{/n} "Ihr ... primitiven ... Schaben! Ich könnte Jahrhunderte damit verbringen, dir die Katastrophe zu erklären, die ihr ausgelöst habt, als ihr die Integrität und hermetische Isolation dieses Ortes verletzt habt, des Repositoriums der Geschichte selbst. Allerdings sind deine beschränkten synaptischen Verbindungen nicht in der Lage, diese Informationen in all ihrer Monstrosität zu erfassen."

languages.text: {n}魂のない投影が痙攣し、ちらつくが、トラズン・ザ・インフィニットの声は鮮明に響く。彼の言葉から滴る冷酷な憎悪は、あなたの血を凍りつかせる。{/n} 「お前ら…原始的な…害虫！この場所、歴史そのものの保管庫であるこの場所の完全性と密閉性を侵害したことで引き起こした大惨事を説明するのに、私は何世紀も費やすことができる。しかし、お前たちの限られた神経回路は、この恐ろしい事実を処理し吸収する能力も持たない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The soulless projection twitches and flickers, but Trazyn the Infinite's voice comes through clear and distinct — and the cold, bone-deep spite that drips from his every word freezes the blood in your veins.{/n} "You... primitive... pests! I could spend centuries explaining the catastrophe you have wrought by violating the integrity and hermetic containment of this place, the repository of history itself, but your limited synaptic connections are not even capable of processing and absorbing this information in all its monstrousness."
